label: ✨ New — Plan around your plants
items: Pick the plants you want — from your Shed or by searching our library, plant databases or AI — and let Rhozly design the plan for you.
The AI works out how many areas to use, which plants pair well together (and why), and the maintenance tasks for each group.
Choose whether to use your existing areas, add new ones, or design it all from scratch.
Not quite right? Regenerate with a quick note on what to change — and it learns your taste for next time.
One tap sets it all up: it creates the areas, adds the plants to your Shed, and schedules the care tasks.
Find it on the Planner under "My Plants". Part of the Sage plan.
